title: Baked Sea Bass with Sweet Treat Glaze
description: A delicious Chinese-inspired dish featuring sea bass glazed with a sweet and sticky treat sauce.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and grease with vegetable oil.
Place the sea bass fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
In a small saucepan, combine honey, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the rice vinegar and cook for an additional minute.
Brush the glaze over the sea bass fillets.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Remove from the oven and brush with the crushed sweet treat.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the sweet treat is caramelized.
